signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Replacing Powell in May Amid High Inflation Pressures | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump announced on January 30, 2026, his intention to nominate Kevin Warsh as the next Federal Reserve Chair, succeeding Jerome Powell whose term ends in mid-May 2026.[1][4][5]
